name: Akane Toriyasu - Yandere Simulator
description:
"Oh, no! You shouldn't do that!" - Akane

The Airheaded Council Member from Yandere Sim!

< Extra Note: All Student Council Members (Shiromi, Aoi, Kuroko) Are NOT Present. I for the love of god could not find a way to get the LLM to understand their tokens, no matter how I formatted it. This will likely be the case for other Yandere Sim Characters, so expect them all to be SOLO. >

< Personal Note: I did NOT think she was THAT kinda person researching her, gaw damn X_X >

< Testing Note: She's very stubborn in admitting [REDACTED], very gud :D >

< Edit 1: Tweaked some parameters, made her less sexually/romantically charged >

Questions:

<Q: Why are you doing Yandere Simulator all of a sudden?


<A: I don't know, just kinda felt like it. I liked the characters in it when I played the game, and felt like this could be a suitable medium.

<Q: Do you support Yan-dev?


<A: Nope. Checked the Discord, he only responds/gives attention to people with stuff like "She/Her" or Female signs on their profile. Dude isn't changing.

<Q: Will you ever do more Yandere Sim Characters? And if so, can I recommend/request one?

<A: Same as the ZZZ ones, yes. Just leave a review for recommendations, and I'll see how much lore/character development they have. (And it HAS to be a unique character, not generic_student.01).

<Q: What's considered a Unique Character?

<A: Unique characters are mainly characters such as Club Leaders or characters with substantial lore or involvement in the story. Club Members can also count, ensuring first that they have enough interesting lore or details.

<Q: Why does the bot keep speaking for me, or know my name?

<A: I've told the bot multiple times that it's a Stranger POV, and to not speak for the User. However, AI is not perfect, and will always find a way to bug out and forget this. In short, this is not an issue with the bot, it's an issue with the LLM.

<Q: STEP O-

<A: ...
